author: chatgpt-codex-connector
body:
**<sub><sub>![P2 Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P2-yellow?style=flat)</sub></sub>  Add a devcontainer for the workshop toolchain**

This PlatformIO/OpenSCAD/Python stack is meant for a beginner on day one, but the dossier never includes the setup-reproducibility tool that makes that realistic. Add `.devcontainer/devcontainer.json`/Codespaces so OpenSCAD, PlatformIO, Arduino CLI, Python packages, and VS Code extensions are pinned in one environment ([GitHub dev containers](https://docs.github.com/codespaces/setting-up-your-project-for-codespaces/introduction-to-dev-containers), [Dev Container spec](https://devcontainers.github.io/implementors/json_reference/)); otherwise the first session can stall on local installs instead of the maker loop.

Useful? React with 👍 / 👎.
